title: fresh install via Taskfile + Ollama backend
description:
## Summary
- Add `openclaw/` config dir (`.env.example` + README) and `Taskfile.openclaw.yml` with backup/install/configure/start/status/logs/restore/wipe.
- OpenClaw on the WSL host points at the existing Ollama (`10.10.0.3:11434/v1`); no cluster/llm-router/GPU-host change.
- BATS unit test pins the Taskfile shape and `.env.example` keys; CLAUDE.md gains a pointer in the Local-first LLM pipeline section.

## Test plan
- [x] `bats tests/unit/openclaw-taskfile.bats` — 6/6 pass
- [x] `task --list-all | grep openclaw` — all 8 tasks discovered
- [x] `task test:all` — only pre-existing unrelated failure (`\${DOCS_IMAGE}:latest` on main)
- [ ] Runtime (WSL host, manual per plan Task 7+8): `task openclaw:backup && task openclaw:install && task openclaw:configure && task openclaw:status`

Implements plan `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-14-openclaw-fresh-install.md`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
